strengths: Proven experience building event-driven systems and open-source infrastructure with real-world deployment (e.g., GISCollective, DLang services)
Hands-on exposure to agentic workflows via MCP code generators and AI-agent tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated engineering leadership through workshops, CI/CD setup, and cross-functional team enablement
concerns: No explicit evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production fintech or regulated financial environments
Lack of demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal mention of real-time inference, streaming data pipelines, or financial risk/credit systems core to the role
response.justification: The candidate brings strong systems engineering skills and hands-on exposure to event-driven architectures and emerging agentic tooling, but lacks demonstrable experience in regulated fintech environments, large-scale AI system ownership, and the leadership depth required to scale a technical team from 10 to 30+ engineers — critical gaps for this executive role.
